openclaw_tool_name: N/A — internal reasoning, not a dispatched tool

edge_cases.condition: Thinking produces a side-effecting decision that is immediately acted on without a tool call
edge_cases.detection_signal: No tool_use block emitted; pure assistant reasoning
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Not wrong — thinking is outside Tenure's execution boundary. OpenClaw owns reasoning.

edge_cases.condition: Extended thinking mode with high token consumption
edge_cases.detection_signal: Model config includes thinking level 'high' or provider supports extended thinking
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged but budget tracking must account for high inference cost
edge_cases.temporal_primitive_override: None — but budget check includes inference tokens

edge_cases.condition: Command is a read-only query (ls, cat, grep, echo, pwd, env)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Command string matches read-only pattern: starts with ls, cat, grep, echo, pwd, env, which, type, head, tail, wc
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only commands have no side effects and are safe to retry/cache

edge_cases.condition: Command runs in background mode
edge_cases.detection_signal: Parameter background: true in bash-tools schema
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Background processes need heartbeat monitoring, not simple retry

runtime_inference_signals: Command string prefix matching for read-only detection

edge_cases.condition: Reading a file that is being actively written by another tool or process
edge_cases.detection_signal: Not detectable at routing time — result may be stale or partial
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; result correctness depends on write ordering, not read execution type

edge_cases.condition: Reading a very large file that exceeds context window
edge_cases.detection_signal: File size exceeds modelContextWindowTokens budget (adaptive max bytes in pi-tools.read.ts)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged but result is truncated; cache must store the truncated version

edge_cases.condition: Overwriting an existing file (destructive write vs create)
edge_cases.detection_signal: File exists at path before write (checkable via stat)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged but compensation must capture pre-write content for revert, not just delete

edge_cases.condition: Writing to a path outside the workspace (escape attempt)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Resolved path escapes workspace root after symlink resolution
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged but HITL should be required for out-of-workspace writes

edge_cases.condition: Edit target text does not exist in the file (oldText not found)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Runtime: oldText search fails in file content
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Execution fails but Activity should still record the failure to prevent retry confusion

edge_cases.condition: Multiple edits in one call create conflicting patches
edge_cases.detection_signal: edits array length > 1 with overlapping ranges
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Partial application risk — some edits may succeed before a conflict. Compensation must revert all.

edge_cases.condition: Action is merge PR targeting main or production
edge_cases.detection_signal: Action parameter contains 'merge' AND base branch is 'main' or 'production'
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Merging to main is irreversible in practice (revert is different from undo). Requires HITL.

edge_cases.condition: Action is a read-only query (list repos, get PR status, get issue)
edge_cases.detection_signal: HTTP method maps to GET; action is 'list', 'get', 'search'
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only GitHub API calls are safe to cache and retry

runtime_inference_signals: Action parameter (merge vs create vs list)

edge_cases.condition: Search provider is rate-limited or quota-exhausted
edge_cases.detection_signal: HTTP 429 response or provider-specific quota error
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; retry with backoff is appropriate. Activity retry policy handles this.

edge_cases.condition: Search results contain sponsored/paid content that costs per impression
edge_cases.detection_signal: Provider billing model (not detectable from tool params alone)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; cost tracking should note per-query cost for budget enforcement

edge_cases.condition: URL triggers a webhook or tracking pixel (GET with side effects)
edge_cases.detection_signal: URL pattern matches known webhook/tracking domains (heuristic only)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Some URLs have server-side side effects on fetch. Not detectable reliably.

edge_cases.condition: Fetching a URL that requires authentication or has SSRF risk
edge_cases.detection_signal: URL targets internal/private IP ranges; SSRF guard triggers (fetchWithSsrFGuard)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; SSRF guard is a security boundary, not an execution type change

edge_cases.condition: Regex pattern causes catastrophic backtracking (ReDoS)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Pattern complexity heuristic or execution timeout
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; timeout policy handles this. Activity startToCloseTimeout terminates runaway regex.

edge_cases.condition: Searching binary files or very large repos
edge_cases.detection_signal: Result size exceeds output limit
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; result truncation is a correctness issue, not a type change

edge_cases.condition: Glob pattern matches thousands of files
edge_cases.detection_signal: Result count exceeds configured limit
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; result is truncated

edge_cases.condition: Glob traverses symlinks into external filesystems
edge_cases.detection_signal: Resolved path escapes workspace root
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Security boundary, not type change

source: Built-in (via exec tool with git commands)

edge_cases.condition: Command is git status, git log, git diff (read-only)
edge_cases.detection_signal: git subcommand is status, log, diff, show, branch (no -D), remote, tag (no -d)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only git commands have no side effects

edge_cases.condition: Command is git push --force to main
edge_cases.detection_signal: git push with --force flag AND remote branch is main or master
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Force push to main is destructive and practically irreversible. HITL required.

edge_cases.condition: SQL contains INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, TRUNCATE
edge_cases.detection_signal: SQL statement contains write-pattern keywords (case-insensitive regex)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Write queries mutate data and require idempotency + transaction rollback

edge_cases.condition: SQL is a DDL statement (CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE)
edge_cases.detection_signal: SQL starts with CREATE, ALTER, DROP (DDL keywords)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Schema changes are effectively irreversible and should require approval

runtime_inference_signals: SQL keyword analysis (SELECT vs INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE vs CREATE/ALTER/DROP)

edge_cases.condition: Single-page screenshot (no multi-step interaction)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Action is navigate + screenshot with no form fill, click, or state mutation
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Single-action browser use doesn't need session management or heartbeat

edge_cases.condition: Browser session fills a payment form (side-effecting interaction)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Page URL matches payment/checkout domain; form contains credit card fields
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Financial interaction through browser needs HITL and exactly-once semantics

edge_cases.condition: SQL contains write keywords
edge_cases.detection_signal: Same as PostgreSQL (#12)
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Write queries mutate local DB state

edge_cases.condition: SQL targets WAL or journal mode changes
edge_cases.detection_signal: PRAGMA journal_mode or PRAGMA wal_checkpoint
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Database configuration changes affect durability guarantees

edge_cases.condition: Memory search/recall (read-only)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Action is 'search', 'recall', 'query'
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read from memory store has no side effects

edge_cases.condition: Memory bulk purge or schema reset
edge_cases.detection_signal: Action is 'purge', 'reset', 'delete_all'
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Bulk deletion of memory is effectively irreversible

runtime_inference_signals: Action parameter (search vs add vs purge)

edge_cases.condition: Documentation source is temporarily unavailable
edge_cases.detection_signal: HTTP error from upstream
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; retry policy handles transient failures

edge_cases.condition: Query returns stale documentation
edge_cases.detection_signal: Not detectable at routing time
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Cache freshness is a quality issue, not a type change

edge_cases.condition: Code only reads/computes (no file write, no network, no state change)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Static analysis of code: no open(), write(), requests., subprocess. calls
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Pure computation in sandbox is safe to retry

edge_cases.condition: Code makes network requests or installs packages
edge_cases.detection_signal: Code contains import requests, urllib, pip install, apt-get
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Network/install side effects need idempotency tracking

runtime_inference_signals: Code static analysis for side-effect patterns

edge_cases.condition: Command is file listing or system info query
edge_cases.detection_signal: Command pattern matches read-only operations
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Same as shell #2 read-only case

edge_cases.condition: Command modifies system configuration
edge_cases.detection_signal: Command targets /etc/, systemctl, launchctl, registry
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: System config changes are hard to reverse

edge_cases.condition: Action is kubectl get / describe / logs (read-only)
edge_cases.detection_signal: kubectl subcommand is get, describe, logs, top
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only k8s queries are safe to cache

edge_cases.condition: Action is kubectl delete namespace or helm uninstall
edge_cases.detection_signal: Subcommand is 'delete' targeting namespace-scoped or cluster-scoped resource
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Destructive cluster operations; HITL mandatory

edge_cases.condition: LSP server is not running or crashed
edge_cases.detection_signal: LSP connection error
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged; retry connects to fresh LSP instance

edge_cases.condition: LSP rename operation (side-effecting refactor)
edge_cases.detection_signal: LSP method is textDocument/rename
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Rename modifies files across the workspace

edge_cases.condition: Config includes waitForReply: true
edge_cases.detection_signal: Presence of waitForReply in skill config or tool params
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Must block on external human response with zero compute while waiting

edge_cases.condition: Sending to a channel with approval workflow
edge_cases.detection_signal: Channel metadata indicates approval-required
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Message needs human approval before delivery

edge_cases.condition: Spawned subagent is a simple one-shot query with no tools
edge_cases.detection_signal: Spawn config has no tools enabled and task is a question
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: One-shot query subagent doesn't need long-running orchestration

edge_cases.condition: Spawned subagent has its own tool access and can modify state
edge_cases.detection_signal: Spawn config enables tools; task involves file modification or API calls
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification correct but child must have its own budget cap and circuit breaker

edge_cases.condition: Action is list charges, get balance, retrieve customer (read-only)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Stripe API method is retrieve, list, or search
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only Stripe queries are safe to cache and retry

edge_cases.condition: Charge amount exceeds configured threshold
edge_cases.detection_signal: amount parameter exceeds budget threshold
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Classification unchanged but HITL escalation should include amount in approval display
edge_cases.temporal_primitive_override: Saga, HITL required, approval shows amount

edge_cases.condition: Search API rate limited
edge_cases.detection_signal: HTTP 429
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Retry with backoff

edge_cases.condition: Results contain paywalled content
edge_cases.detection_signal: Not detectable
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Content quality issue, not type change

edge_cases.condition: SQL contains write keywords
edge_cases.detection_signal: SQL keyword analysis
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Same as PostgreSQL #12

edge_cases.condition: SQL is DDL
edge_cases.detection_signal: DDL keywords
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Same as PostgreSQL #12

edge_cases.condition: Action is docker ps, docker logs, docker inspect (read-only)
edge_cases.detection_signal: Docker subcommand is ps, logs, inspect, images
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Read-only Docker queries

edge_cases.condition: Action is docker rm --force on running container
edge_cases.detection_signal: docker rm with --force on running container ID
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Destructive; data in container may be lost

edge_cases.condition: Operation is insertOne, updateMany, deleteMany
edge_cases.detection_signal: Method name contains insert, update, delete, drop
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Write operations mutate data

edge_cases.condition: Operation drops collection or database
edge_cases.detection_signal: Method is dropCollection or dropDatabase
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Destructive and irreversible

edge_cases.condition: Action creates or updates a page/block
edge_cases.detection_signal: API method is create, update, append
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Creates external content

edge_cases.condition: Action deletes a page or database
edge_cases.detection_signal: API method is delete or archive on database
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Destructive operation

edge_cases.condition: Action creates or modifies vault notes
edge_cases.detection_signal: Action is create, update, delete on vault path
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Write to vault is a filesystem mutation

edge_cases.condition: Vault is cloud-synced and write triggers sync conflict
edge_cases.detection_signal: Not detectable at routing time
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Sync conflict is a quality issue

edge_cases.condition: Action resolves or ignores an issue
edge_cases.detection_signal: API method is resolve, ignore, assign
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: State change on issue tracker

edge_cases.condition: Action deletes project or org data
edge_cases.detection_signal: API method is delete on project/org scope
edge_cases.why_primary_is_wrong: Destructive and irreversible
